title: iberis amara subsp. forestieri
intro: Iberis amara subsp. forestieri, also known as Alpine Rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iberis amara subsp. forestieri include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antiseptic and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
